subcodes.first_line: O ye faithful ones! In the world of existence, amongst them that bow down in prayer, faithfulness is a radiant light and a gleaming meteor in the human realm, and is the most [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای وفاداران در عالم وجود نزد اهل سجود وفا نور ساطع و شهاب لامع عالم انسانى است و اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @prayer for governments and rulers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
